title: IRIS: LLM-Assisted Static Analysis for Detecting Security Vulnerabilities
reason: Neuro-symbolic approach combining LLMs with static analysis for security vulnerability detection (program reasoning).
LLMs integrated with compiler analysis for input-centric optimization, combining PL and AI

title: Artemis: Toward Accurate Detection of Server-Side Request Forgeries through LLM-Assisted Inter-procedural Path-Sensitive Taint Analysis.
reason: Uses LLM-assisted static taint analysis for detecting SSRF vulnerabilities, integrating AI with program analysis for semantic correctness.

title: ProfiX: Improving Profile-Guided Optimization in Compilers with Graph Neural Networks
reason: GNNs for compiler optimization (PGO) relates to program analysis, a peripheral but relevant neuro-symbolic angle.

title: Probabilistic Reasoning with LLMs for Privacy Risk Estimation
reason: LLM probabilistic reasoning for risk estimation; method involves structured reasoning but not directly applied to code/programs.

title: CLNX: Bridging Code and Natural Language for C/C++ Vulnerability-Contributing Commits Identification
reason: LLM-based method for code analysis (vulnerability detection) using structured code representations.

title: CyberPal.AI: Empowering LLMs with Expert-Driven Cybersecurity Instructions
reason: Fine-tunes LLMs for cybersecurity, a domain-specific reasoning task; relates to reliability of LLMs on complex instructions.

title: Security Attacks on LLM-based Code Completion Tools
reason: Studies security vulnerabilities (jailbreaking, data extraction) specific to LLM-based code completion tools.

title: Crossfire: An Elastic Defense Framework for Graph Neural Networks Under Bit Flip Attacks
reason: Defense for GNNs against bit-flip attacks; relates to reliability and verifiable restoration of model integrity.

title: MTVHunter: Smart Contracts Vulnerability Detection Based on Multi-Teacher Knowledge Translation
reason: Detects smart contract vulnerabilities via program analysis; connects LLMs/analysis to code correctness.

title: BERT-Based Code Learning for Exception Localization and Type Prediction
reason: Uses BERT and Bi-LSTM for program analysis (exception localization/type prediction), relates to code reliability.

title: SCALM: Detecting Bad Practices in Smart Contracts Through LLMs
reason: LLM-based framework (SCALM) for detecting bad practices in smart contracts, connecting LLMs to program analysis.
